subcodes.first_line: The Day of God hath come, the Throne of Utterance hath appeared at the pole of contingent being, and the Speaker of Sinai is established thereon. The river of mercy hath descended [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یوم الله آمد سریر بیان در قطب امکان ظاهر و مکلم طور بر آن مستوی فرات رحمت از
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Manifestation of God does not act of own volition, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @suffering and imprisonment, @proclamation to Muslims, @proclamation to Christians, @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @transcendence; unknowability of God, @proclamation to Jews, @lack of formal education of the Manifestation of God
